cooperates.cooperate_desc: Nana sangat senang dengan hero yang bisa ngumpulin musuh atau nge aggro musuh lain kaya Tigreal, Belerick, Atlas, Gatotkaca, Khufra.

counters.counter_desc: Nana ngecounter hero bengong karena skill 2 nya itu bukan stun, tapi morph, High level CC yang bisa ngeberentiin banyak skill yang gabisa diberentiin pake CC biasa, kaya Odette, Claude. Rangenya juga lumayan jauh jadi bisa dipake buat ngecancel dan outrange Pharsa atau Lunox.
Nana gabisa di burst. Jadi Nana bakalan jarang diincer sama hero burst yang cuma bisa sekali combo macam Saber, Eudora, Vale, Kadita, Harley, Gussion, Haya.

Nana sangat kecounter sama hero yang licin dan punya banyak blink kaya Ling, Lance, Benedetta, HC, YSS. Plus Skill 2 nya sampah banget karena cast timenya 2 tahun. Dan molina juga udah ga ngejar lama kaya dulu.

dominants.dominant_desc: Farming, Rotasi, gunain skill semaksimal mungkin buat farm dan poke musuh.
Dmg Nana sangat sakit di late game, apalagi kalo udah ada holy crystal. Cukup jaga jarak dan maksimalin stun dari ulti kalau bisa.

emblems.emblem_desc: Nana sangat sangat perlu item, karena early damage skill 1 Nana sangat nanggung buat clear minion.

equips.equip_desc: Build Nana sangat boring karena Nana ga flexible, satu satunya item yang bisa dituker cuma Winter Crown ke Immortal

Karena sekarang lagi meta Fighter, Build ini lebih berguna daripada yang burst. Plus Nana gaperlu beli Winter karena gaada hero yang bisa kill nana secara instant di meta sekarang. (selama ada Passive).

hero.hero_overview: Nana sedikit ga laku di meta sekarang karena damagenya yang sangat sangat nanggung dan CC yang kurang ngaruh. Guide ini diharapkan dapat membuat nana menjadi lebih laku dan dapat digunakan semaksimal mungkin.
hero.hero_strength: Nana kuat buat laning dan teamfight. Heronya sedikit mandiri karena nana punya passive mirip Immortal, but better!.
hero.hero_weakness: Hero yang bisa ngejar (banyak dash) sulit buat dilawan pake Nana, karena CC Nana lama castingnya.

data.recommend: Buat cewe cewe yang suka pake Nana.

spell.spell_desc: Nana ga terlalu perlu flicker karena dia punya passive. Sprint lebih berguna buat ngehindari musuh yang ngejar dia. Atau bisa juga pakai Flameshot buat combo pake ultinya.

hero.hero_overview: Onun minyon itimi ve genel de büyü gücü ile lord ve canavarları alması ile bilinir calida pusup tavşan ve ulti basarak kasılan tek hero.
hero.hero_strength: Onun gücü tavşanı ile ultisinin kombosudur. O bir canavar ve bir o kadar tatlı ve sevimli onu hafifa almayın dostum.
hero.hero_weakness: Ultisinin az ve bir o kadar da tavşan oyuncağın süresi bi tık az süre de olması onu zayıf gösteriyor.

spell.spell_desc: Genel de ışınlanma alırım genel de alev alışı bir karaketer geldiğin de itmeye veya onun canı az olduğu halde benim ultim ile ölmedi ise tek de atış da çok işe yarıyor alev atışı .

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Their compatibility is superb especially in team fight.

counters.counter_desc: Best to counter hero who's skill dependent as nana's second skill can morph them interrupting their skills.

dominants.dominant_desc: Fast clear the first wave minions to quickly rotate to gold lane for ganking using the second skill of nana.

emblems.emblem_desc: For burst damage

equips.equip_desc: For burst damage and cooldown reduction

spell.spell_desc: for escape and chase

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Maganda kasi si Nana sa team fight.  Magandang mga perfect heroes na combination sa kanya ay ang mga heroes na may set. Like tigreal..

counters.counter_desc: Para sa akin ang counter ng nana ko ay si Hayabusa. Lagi akong tinatarget ng mga nag hahayabusa lalo na kapag wala akong molina.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Tips: Mag back up ka lagi sa core kapag may turtle. Napaka useful ng nana sa agawan ng turtle. Alam mo kung bakit? Pwede mong ma stun ang core ng kalaban at mas pabor na kayo ang makakuha sa turtle.

Please, always visit gold lane. Sumama ka sa tank o kaya sa core lagi kapag may clash. Wag mo din iwan lane mo kapag katapat mo si chang e sa lane mo.


Always ban mo yung mga heroes na ayaw ni Nana.

emblems.emblem_desc: secret lang po muna ang emblem set up ko. You can use emblem set po sa mga pro's.

equips.equip_desc: Second item ko talaga ay sky piercer kapag naka early kill ako para makapag stack agad ako sa skypiercer ko. If pansin mong na feed na kakampi mo at hindi ka naka early kill, mas okay wag ka nalang mag sky piercer.

hero.hero_overview: From Epic na rank ko hanggang nakapag glory ako, ginagamit ko si nana. Pero.. laging may nag rereklamo na team mates ko o kaya kalaban sa hero na ginagamit ko dahil bakit sa lahat ng hero na mage, si nana ang ginamit ko sa Glory Tier.
hero.hero_strength: Kapag naka sky piercer ako at naka early kill, matik hanggang matapos ang game sobrang sakit ng nana ko. First wave ng minions nagcleclear ako then dalaw agad sa gold. Then balik agad sa lain kapag may panibagong waves ng minions.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weakness ng nana ko? First sa mga hero.. Isa si Hayabusa sa kahinaan ni Nana kapag walang passive. Gusion din, Yin at Lancelot. Sa katapat niya naman sa lane, ayaw ko makatapat si Zetian.

Kapag dumalaw agad ako sa gold, please sa tank at core dyan.. huwag na huwag niyong i-clear mid ko.


Kapag naka early ang kalaban, mahihirapan na talaga ako.

data.recommend: can nana be in the glory tier?

spell.spell_desc:
Ginagamit ko ang flameshot from epic na rank ko hanggang mythical glory.

But mythic glory up, gamit ko naman ay flicker.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: For tigreal is a perfect match, as his ulti is helpfull as you can easily burst the enemy down without hassle

counters.counter_desc: I don't like this hero, since i can't literally get close to her, making my skills at disadvantage since her second skill can redirect my ulti or skills away from her.

dominants.dominant_desc: My tricks are, throwing my second skill, ulti and first skill then flameshot. That way the enemy has no time to react and flameshot to make sure they cannot escape at low hp. You must do this order quickly.

First help your jungler before going to your lane, always check bushes to avoid being ambushed. Don't throw your skills carelessly, you must prioritize an enemy which you can easily take down. Don't leave your teammates behind, if you can, you can throw your 2nd skill to slow them down so that way u can atleast save them.

I always prioritise to target the enemy marksman since they deal damage to our team. When your team got ulti'd by tanks(tigreal, franco, etc.) throw your second skill immediately that way before they get stunned, you can get them saved easily. But always prioritized hitting enemy with high damage.

emblems.emblem_desc: I use this emblem to further give critical damage to the enemy

equips.equip_desc: I use demon boots in order to not recall to the base for low mana, and in order to rotate easily, then sky piercer if you're lucky you can stack early, then genius wand to burst a targeted enemy, then glowing wand for anti heal, lightning truncheon then holy crystal to give more damage

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With Tigreal's ultimate that produces crowd control, Nana and Tigreal are the best hero combo. Tigreal's ultimate also sucks the opponent and stuns the opponent, Ultimate nana is very effective

counters.counter_desc: Almost all assassin heroes can be stopped by Nana, but this time I chose Ling. but nana can be countered by benedetta because of the immunity she has

dominants.dominant_desc:
You will always be able to get first blood if you use flameshot.
You just need to poke the opponent with Nana's skill 1, and once Nana reaches level 2, start a combo with Skill 1 & 2 simultaneously, then flameshot from a distance. Flameshot damage The further away you use the flameshot, the greater the damage the flameshot produces.

emblems.emblem_desc: You can change Rupture to Agility to quickly backup to the gold lane. and as we know, nana will be very strong in the late game but I gave her Bergain Hunter so that the necessary items can be obtained quickly, so it will remain balanced against the opponent's carry
All explained before

equips.equip_desc: Your movement will be aided by Lightning Truncheon and Genius Wand, As we know, Nana is a poke hero and she is also a burst damage type.

spell.spell_desc: Nana doesn't have escape skills when there is no passive, so flicker is the best battle spell for nana. if you are confident to be a mid carry, you can use battle spell flameshot. because nana's ultimate is often not hit by all three. with a combo of skill 2, and the ultimate is hit 2x then flameshot

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Nana and Franco works well together because of their skills. Franco can hook and Nana can turn enemy into Molina which helps to use her ultimate on them precisely.
